description: A lightweight Custom Elements library with fast built-in render core. Create reactive web components with efficient DOM updates, signals-based reactivity, and server-side rendering support.
rules: Use Html.wire(obj, ':id') for rendering arrays to prevent XSS and ensure efficient DOM reuse
Prefer functional API over class-based for simpler components
Use signals (signal, computed, effect) for reactive state
Return cleanup function from setup() for resources that need disposal
Use batch() when updating multiple signals to trigger effects only once
